mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_refund ( refund_no, order_id, user_id, refund_type, refund_amount, refund_reason, evidence_images, status, expire_time ) VALUES ( #{request.refundId}, #{request.orderId}, #{request.userId}, #{request.refundType}, #{request.refundAmount}, #{request.refundReason}, #{request.evidenceImages}, #{request.status}, #{request.expireTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, refund_no, refund_type, refund_amount, refund_reason, status, apply_time, audit_time, refund_time, fail_reason FROM order_refund WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT id, refund_no, refund_type, refund_amount, refund_reason, status, apply_time, audit_time, refund_time, fail_reason FROM order_refund WHERE id IN
#{id}
